model.geckolib.winefox_saint.name: Saint Wine Fox
model.geckolib.winefox_saint.desc.1: §7The saintess who serves the gods punishes evil spirits and offers blessings to all living beings.
model.geckolib.winefox_saint_black.name: Black Saint Wine Fox
§7A dark-winged saintess whose cold judgment falls upon every profaner.
model.geckolib.winefox_elf.name: Elf Wine Fox
model.geckolib.winefox_elf.desc.1: §7Wine Fox Fantasy Series — The fox girl, in her elven form, radiates a lush, primal essence of nature.
